body:
Hi Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) deal pipeline for Q1. I've had a chance to dig into the two climate infrastructure companies you flagged, and I think the grid-edge storage play is the stronger bet of the two — the unit economics on their behind-the-meter installations are genuinely compelling, and the founding team has a track record I find hard to argue with. The AI inference optimization company is interesting but feels a bit early for a Series A check given where their customer pipeline sits right now. I'd suggest we set up a call early next week to align on which one to prioritize before the holidays slow everything down — does Tuesday or Wednesday work on your end?

Omar
